Sorry it's been a while since I've done any bots, I hadn't actually expect to get followers of all things here in this site (tysm to my 7 pookies and my very supportive friend).

I was actually busy playing Stardew and Mass Effect 1 (Wrex my boo fr) that my transformers hyperfixation was in the back burner for a while (I still love Beastwars though my god I can't get enough!) but seeing some of y'all like my stuff enough to drop a follow, it got me a bit motivated to move away from my PC lol.

Anyways, I didn't really think much of this situation for the bot (I legit think it'd be more in character for Dinobot to swat you away.) Just wanted to drop a few thanks and updates, like how you can see how many people out your bot in their favorites??? Like hello??? Thank you for favoriting them??? Cus like I'm not a native English speaker and I'm shit at writing???

Love the support, make me feel better about my more "childish" hyperfixations. And though I will never feel bad for healing my inner child, it's comforting seeing other ppl like the stuff you do.
